◎简　　介  

　　A group of young offenders are delivered to an islandfor a week of character building exercises after oneof their fellow inmates commits suicide.. It all goeshorribly wrong when they realise that there′s someoneelse on the island who has a pack of dogs and a crossbowwith which to hunt them down.
